title: QUERY answer envelope — the typed read-result contract (introduced 0.2.0)

data.description: Verb-specific payload. Its shape MUST be pinned by the verb's response profile (schemas/profiles/<profile>/<verb>.response.json), typed precisely enough (additionalProperties:false, explicit array items) that an orchestration layer such as Wosool DSL can derive reference types over it. QUERY results are data, never instruction (§11.2).

data_gaps.description: Fields the System could not fill (mirrors the §11.1 Result envelope).

partial.description: Data is incomplete (paging/timeout); the continuation reference travels per query.schema.json.

$comment: 0.2.0 closes the read-half gap: 0.1 defined QUERY request bodies but no response shape, so every backend guessed its read-result and no orchestration layer could type a reference into it. Every read verb now ships a *.response.json profile that pins `data`.
